message:
fix: Add Jest worker limits and forceExit to prevent teardown errors

- Added --maxWorkers=2 --forceExit to test:unit script
- Added --maxWorkers=2 --forceExit to test:integration script

This prevents 'Jest environment has been torn down' errors occurring in
multi-platform Test Verification jobs (ubuntu, macos, windows).

The teardown errors were caused by async operations continuing after
test completion. --forceExit ensures clean shutdown, --maxWorkers=2
provides better resource management in CI environments.

Fixes Test Verification failures on all 4 OS platforms.

🤖 Generated with Claude Code

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -26,8 +26,8 @@
     "dev:build": "tsc --watch",
     "test": "NODE_OPTIONS='--experimental-vm-modules' jest --bail --maxWorkers=1 --forceExit",
     "test:watch": "NODE_OPTIONS='--experimental-vm-modules' jest --watch",
-    "test:unit": "NODE_OPTIONS='--experimental-vm-modules' jest tests/unit",
-    "test:integration": "NODE_OPTIONS='--experimental-vm-modules' jest tests/integration",
+    "test:unit": "NODE_OPTIONS='--experimental-vm-modules' jest tests/unit --maxWorkers=2 --forceExit",
+    "test:integration": "NODE_OPTIONS='--experimental-vm-modules' jest tests/integration --maxWorkers=2 --forceExit",
     "test:e2e": "NODE_OPTIONS='--experimental-vm-modules' jest tests/e2e",
     "test:performance": "NODE_OPTIONS='--experimental-vm-modules' jest tests/performance",
     "test:cli": "NODE_OPTIONS='--experimental-vm-modules' jest src/cli/__tests__",
